description_long: This is a low, rectangular wooden cabinet with a dark brown wood grain finish and a modern, minimalist design. The front features four drawers, each with a sleek, black recessed handle, providing ample storage space. The back reveals the internal structure, showing white shelving and compartments, some of which are open and others divided for organization. The sides and top are solid wood panels, giving the piece a sturdy and substantial appearance. The cabinet is designed to sit directly on the floor, making it suitable for use as a TV stand, storage unit, or bench in urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or garages. Its clean lines and practical layout make it both functional and visually appealing.
description: A modern, dark brown wooden cabinet with four drawers and black recessed handles, featuring a white internal shelving structure visible from the back.
description_view_0: The left side of the cabinet, showing a solid wood panel with a dark brown finish and no visible features.
description_view_1: The front of the cabinet, displaying four drawers with black recessed handles and a clean, minimalist design.
description_view_2: The right side of the cabinet, similar to the left, with a solid wood panel and no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: The back of the cabinet, revealing the white internal shelving and compartments, with visible hardware and open storage spaces.
